transcription.text: A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H I love you still, and you know I always will Till the end of time, I will change my mind Love you, I'll be here, I will never disappear Said forever, I swear so, I will be there You said you didn't wanna be like everybody else Wanted something only you and I can have ourselves
